steps.expected: /domain/ loads with ER diagram content area
steps.observed: /domain/ returns 200 but shows Domain Modeling start UI (no ER diagram)

assertions.title: Sidebar includes Domain/ER Diagram navigation entry

steps.expected: Sidebar has Domain/ER entry with icon and /domain/ href
steps.observed: Sidebar includes 🌐 Domain (/domain/) and 📐 ER Diagram (/er/)

assertions.title: Sidebar link navigates to domain page

steps.expected: Clicking entry navigates to /domain/ and renders ER diagram with active state
steps.observed: Navigation to /domain/ and active class worked, but ER diagram did not render there

assertions.issues: Active nav works but ER content is not on /domain/.

steps.expected: /domain/ uses same layout/sidebar conventions as existing pages
steps.observed: /domain/ and /solution/ share same shell and sidebar structure

assertions.title: Existing pages unaffected by domain page addition

steps.expected: All 8 existing pages load without errors
steps.observed: All 8 routes returned 200, but /build/ emitted console error Unexpected token ':'

assertions.issues: Console regression on /build/ violates no-errors expectation.

assertions.title: Domain page responsive on mobile viewport

steps.expected: At 375px, collapsed sidebar and accessible ER diagram on /domain/
steps.observed: Mobile shell adapts and toggle appears, but /domain/ has no ER diagram

assertions.issues: Responsive layout is present; required ER content is absent on /domain/.

assertions.title: Diagram renders entities as labeled boxes

steps.expected: /domain/ renders demo 9 entities (Project..Artifact)
steps.observed: ER diagram appears on /er/ with 3 entities (User, Task, Workspace)

assertions.issues: Demo 9-entity precondition not present in current runtime.

steps.expected: Task shows id,title,description,context,definition_of_done,dependencies,priority,related_specs,status
steps.observed: Task rendered with description,due_date,id,priority,status,title

assertions.title: Relationship lines connect correct entity pairs

steps.expected: Project→Recipe, Recipe→Step, Version→Task links are rendered
steps.observed: Rendered links are User↔Task and User/Task↔Workspace

assertions.issues: Expected demo relationship pairs not present.

assertions.title: Relationship lines show cardinality labels

steps.expected: Cardinality labels (1:1/1:N/N:1 or type labels) are readable
steps.observed: Line descriptions rendered; explicit cardinality text labels not observable

assertions.issues: Explicit cardinality label requirement not met.

assertions.title: All relationship types render distinctly

steps.expected: Distinct rendering for has_one/has_many/belongs_to/produces/feeds_back/validates_gate
steps.observed: Current dataset only contains has_many and belongs_to, including after mock step3 setup

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/start -> 200; POST /api/domain/extract -> 200; types observed: has_many, belongs_to

assertions.issues: Missing relationship-type preconditions in runtime data.

steps.expected: If many_to_many absent, diagram still renders correctly without errors
steps.observed: No many_to_many found; diagram rendered cleanly

steps.expected: Clicking entity opens panel; clicking another updates panel
steps.observed: User panel opened, then Task panel replaced content

assertions.title: Detail panel shows all attributes with types

steps.expected: Task panel lists 9 specified attributes
steps.observed: Task panel listed 6 attributes (description,due_date,id,priority,status,title)

steps.expected: Recipe panel shows has_many → Step and belongs_to ← Project
steps.observed: Recipe entity not present in current domain model

steps.expected: Constraints section shows data or explicit empty state
steps.observed: Constraints rendered for Task/User with severity + enforcement

steps.expected: Traceability section shows links when present, empty state otherwise
steps.observed: User showed implementation/test links; Task showed 'No code linked yet'

steps.expected: Panel can be closed and diagram remains usable
steps.observed: Close button dismissed panel and diagram view restored

assertions.title: Entity description shown in detail panel

steps.expected: Project panel shows specified Project description text
steps.observed: Project entity was not available to select

assertions.title: ER diagram reflects extracted entities from Act 2

steps.expected: After Act 2 step3 extraction, ER shows >=3 entities and count matches source data
steps.observed: After POST /api/domain/start + one extract, ER showed 3 entities matching /api/map/solution/domain data

assertions.title: ER diagram shows relationships with cardinality

steps.expected: Each extracted relationship appears with cardinality label
steps.observed: Relationships rendered, but explicit cardinality label text (e.g., 1:N/M:N) not observed

assertions.issues: Cardinality labels not clearly present as text markers.

steps.expected: Sidebar hidden by default on mobile, toggle shows/hides sidebar, mobile navigation works
steps.observed: Hidden-by-default confirmed (off-canvas transform), toggle opened sidebar, mobile navigation reached /connect/

assertions.title: ER diagram with partial domain data

steps.expected: After Step 3 only (no Step 4 extract), ER still renders
steps.observed: With step3_done state, /er/ rendered entities/relationships without console errors

frictions.description: agent-browser eval heredoc commands failed when chained with additional commands (SyntaxError: Unexpected identifier 'session').
frictions.resolution: Executed eval and follow-up commands in separate invocations.

frictions.description: Mobile semantic/ref clicking on nav links intermittently timed out due off-canvas viewport/animation state.
frictions.resolution: Validated mobile navigation by toggling sidebar and invoking existing link click via DOM, then confirming URL.

frictions.description: Contract path /api/map/solution/domain/entities (and /relationships) returned 404 on this API surface.
frictions.resolution: Used available /api/map/solution/domain endpoint for entity/relationship source data.

blockers.description: Runtime data set lacks Project/Recipe/Step/demo graph and advanced relationship types needed for some assertions.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Performed non-destructive setup via POST /api/domain/start mode=mock + one POST /api/domain/extract; resulting entities stayed User/Task/Workspace and relationship types stayed has_many/belongs_to.

summary: Tested 23 assigned assertions: 10 passed, 10 failed, 3 blocked. Primary issues were ER expectations tied to /domain and demo-specific data not present in current runtime, plus a console regression on /build and missing explicit cardinality text labels.
